case_title: WARREN, STEVEN VS CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF MOTION FOR HEARING ON APPEAL OF PLFTS TERMINATION FROM DEFT SCHOOL. ORDER REVERSING CONTRACT TERMINATION. FACTS SUPPORTIN MOTION ARE:
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-14-1997 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
HIS SUBORDINATES AND OTHER NON-QUALIFIED PERSONS THAT ARE UNDER HIS EMPLOY TO DETERMINE THE VALIDIT Y OF CONTRACT TERMINATION. SEE ATTACHED DECL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WARREN, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROCESS THAT IS BIAS & PREJUDICED AGAINST THE PLFT PLFT FEELS & SO BELIEVES THAT THE SMALL CLAIMS CT. SITTING IN AS AN IMPARTIAL "TRIER OF FACTS" IS A
PROPER FORUM. MR KEOGH TERMINATED PLFT CONTRACT AFTER BEING TOLD THAT PLFT WAS GOING TO D.A'S OFFICE & FILE A FRAUD COMPLAINT. KEOGH HAS DIRECTE
NOTICE\DECLARATION TO CALIFORNIA ACADEMY SERVED TO PAMEL RIZZI AUTH AGENT POS FILED.
PLTF. REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE DATE RESERVED FOR 1/14/97 AT 1:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-12-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-14-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEFT HAS BEEN THREATENED & POTENTIAL WITNESS HAVE BEEN LIED TO & OTHERWISE BEEN COERCED AND DISUEDED FROM SPEAKING BEHALF OF PLFT. DEFTS HAVE APPEALS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA CULINARY ACADEMY
